signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% | YES | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, missing market forecasts of 2.4% but signaling a modest uptick amid Middle East energy shocks.[1]  
This newly reported figure—latest in search results—could shift prediction markets on Bank of Korea rate paths or inflation
